author: pedroaraujo74
description: Import highlights and sources from Screvi. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Screvi Team
manifest.description: Import highlights and sources from Screvi.
manifest.name: Screvi Sync

name: Screvi Sync

releases.author: pedroaraujo74
releases.description:
Cleanup release addressing obsidianmd plugin-validation lint findings.

- Type the regex callback params in `decodeHtmlEntities` so `parseInt` no longer receives an `any`-typed argument.
- Cast `JSON.parse` result in cached-highlights load to a typed shape.
- Replace `builtin-modules` with `node:module#builtinModules` (no extra package).
- Drop `dotenv`; rely on Vite's built-in `loadEnv` for test env vars.

No behavior change for users.

releases.author: pedroaraujo74
releases.description:
## What's new

- **Per-category sync filter.** New "What to sync" section in settings with toggles for Books, Posts, Articles, Documents, YouTube videos, and Personal notes. Disabled categories are skipped on every sync.
- **Smarter source classification.** Uses the new `source_id`/`article_id` discriminator from the export endpoint to tell apart Articles (web articles), Documents (sources-table entries with type=article), and YouTube videos (articles-table rows with a youtube.com / youtu.be URL).
- **File-collision recovery.** Sync no longer fails with "File already exists" when a previously-synced filename differs only in case (e.g. `How to Do Great Work.md` vs `How to do great work.md`). Highlights are appended into the existing file.

## Internals

- New `src/categorize.ts` module + 14 unit tests.
- Folder routing is now category-driven (`Books / Posts / Articles / Documents / YouTube / Personal Notes`).
- Live-API integration test guards against a future regression where the server stops sending the discriminator.
